long_description: At 2025-12-05 08:56:00 UTC IBM Cloud engineers have been alerted by dasbhords, to an issue with VSI provisions across all regions. Customers attempting to provision VSIs may experience longer than usual provisioning times or failed transactions. IBM Cloud engineers are currently investigating the issue and will continue to provide updates until the issue is resolved
short_description: Classic Provisioning failures across multiple regions due to cloudflare issue
current_status_next_steps:
Teams Meeting Link:- https://teams.microsoft.com/dl/launcher/launcher.html?url=%2F_%23%2Fl%2Fmeetup-join%2F19%3Ameeting_ZThkOTBlMDMtZmM5NS00ZDE1LTlmNTgtYjhhMTI1MmQ3ZmI3%40thread.v2%2F0%3Fcontext%3D%257b%2522Tid%2522%253a%2522fcf67057-50c9-4ad4-98f3-ffca64add9e9%2522%252c%2522Oid%2522%253a%2522412c58a6-6db8-4c23-8bab-6389c5c225cf%2522%257d%26anon%3Dtrue&type=meetup-join&deeplinkId=0da44e01-f588-47b9-ad06-05bf11235f24&directDl=true&msLaunch=true&enableMobilePage=true&suppressPrompt=true

Cloudflare has recovered as per the latest status  https://www.cloudflarestatus.com/

We are observing the recovery on the ibm cloud
chronology:
SRE: Mohammed Siddiqui
AVM: Ian Jack

See CIS parent INC10481032 for detailed timeline
